description: §23.5.5 — a foreign-code construct (`use foreign:ml` sidecar, §23.4) with NO `capabilities=` on any ancestor `<program>` is governed by the empty (declare-nothing) set, so the presence-nudge W-FOREIGN-UNDECLARED-CAPABILITY fires (Info). The lint nudges the author to declare the scope's intended capability surface. It is PRESENCE-only (opacity bound §23.2.3 — it never inspects the foreign interior). Advisory (Info) — never blocks the build.
rationale: §23.5.5: the compiler SHALL emit W-FOREIGN-UNDECLARED-CAPABILITY (Info) when a foreign construct is governed by an empty capability set. Here no ancestor declares `capabilities=` → empty → the lint fires as Info (partitions into result.warnings; CLI exit driven by the co-occurring E-FOREIGN-SIDECAR-NOMINAL, which is the §23.4 Nominal fail-closed). No E-SCOPE-001.
